mapper.select: WITH AUTH_MENU AS ( SELECT RF.MENU_ID, MAX(RF.AUTH_CD) AS AUTH_CD FROM CM_ROLE_FUNC RF JOIN CM_USER_ROLE UR ON UR.ROLE_ID = RF.ROLE_ID WHERE UR.COMP_CD = #{compCd} AND UR.USR_ID = #{usrId} GROUP BY RF.MENU_ID ), LEAF AS ( SELECT M.*, A.AUTH_CD FROM CM_MENU M JOIN AUTH_MENU A ON A.MENU_ID = M.MENU_ID WHERE M.USE_YN = 'Y' AND M.DEL_YN = 'N' ) SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, UP_MENU_ID, MENU_LVL, URL, ICON, SORT_NO, AUTH_CD FROM LEAF UNION SELECT P.MENU_ID, P.MENU_NM, P.UP_MENU_ID, P.MENU_LVL, P.URL, P.ICON, P.SORT_NO, NULL AS AUTH_CD FROM CM_MENU P WHERE P.USE_YN = 'Y' AND P.DEL_YN = 'N' AND P.MENU_ID IN (SELECT UP_MENU_ID FROM LEAF WHERE UP_MENU_ID IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY 7, 1
SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, UP_MENU_ID, MENU_LVL, URL, ICON, SORT_NO, USE_YN FROM CM_MENU WHERE DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY SORT_NO, MENU_ID
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CM_MENU WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CM_MENU WHERE UP_MENU_ID = #{menuId} AND DEL_YN = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CM_MENU (MENU_ID, MENU_NM, UP_MENU_ID, MENU_LVL, URL, ICON, SORT_NO, USE_YN, REG_ID, MOD_ID) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{menuNm}, #{upMenuId}, NVL(#{menuLvl}, 1), #{url}, #{icon}, NVL(#{sortNo}, 1), NVL(#{useYn}, 'Y'), #{regId}, #{regId})
mapper.update: UPDATE CM_MENU SET MENU_NM = #{menuNm}, UP_MENU_ID = #{upMenuId}, MENU_LVL = #{menuLvl}, URL = #{url}, ICON = #{icon}, SORT_NO = #{sortNo}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
UPDATE CM_MENU SET DEL_YN = 'Y', MOD_ID = #{modId}, MOD_DT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE ID = #{id}
